about.title: About GoThailandHome
about.subtitle: A Thailand property platform for Chinese and international audiences.
about.body1: GoThailandHome is being built as a practical destination for discovering homes across Thailand. This MVP uses placeholder listings and copy only.
about.body2: Future phases may add richer listing data, enquiry workflows, and market guides. There is no CMS, database, map, or AI integration in this release.
about.missionBody: Make Thailand property discovery clearer for English, Chinese, and Thai users.
